name: Microservices Dashboard
description: Service mesh and distributed tracing monitoring for microservices architecture

nrql.query: SELECT count(*) FROM ServiceMeshRequest TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT percentile(duration, 95) FROM ServiceMeshRequest TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago

SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE status LIKE 
\4%' OR status LIKE \5%') FROM ServiceMeshRequest TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM DistributedTrace WHERE status = \active' TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT average(totalDuration) FROM DistributedTrace TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM CircuitBreakerState FACET state SINCE 15 minutes ago
SELECT count(*) FROM ServiceMeshRequest FACET sourceService, destinationService SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(latency) FROM ServiceDependencyLatency FACET service, dependency TIMESERIES 15 minutes SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sourceService, destinationService, average(duration), count(*) FROM ServiceMeshRequest SINCE 1 hour ago ORDER BY average(duration) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT service, dependency, count(*) FROM ServiceDependencyLatency WHERE success = false SINCE 1 hour ago ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT histogram(duration, 10, 50) FROM ServiceMeshRequest FACET sourceService SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentile(totalDuration, 50, 75, 95, 99) FROM DistributedTrace FACET service SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT service, dependency, failureCount, lastFailureTime FROM CircuitBreakerState WHERE state = \OPEN' SINCE 1 hour ago
